meaning: n.<俚>无,皆无,(德国神话中的)女水妖,女水神int.停!,不要!,不行!vt.禁止,拒绝
examples: Nix the anonymous letter; anyone would crumble under the weight of that humiliation.
That little boy likes to keep nix for his brothers.
Soak nails in lemon juice to nix stains, then use a nail buffer to make tips shiny.
He retired six in a row before Jayson Nix singled to start the third.
Buehrle settled down, allowing only Nix's third-inning walk before Adams singled leading off the fifth.
